# Gabriele Farinella

> Portfolio of Gabriele Farinella, a commercial filmmaker, self-shooting director and
> D.P. based in Amsterdam, specialized in documentary-style films, corporate and social
> media content. Single-page site, available in English and Dutch.

## About

Gabriele helps businesses connect to their customers through engaging stories and powerful
images. Over a decade of experience in narrative storytelling, documentary, corporate and
content creation.

## Sections

- [Home](#home): Introduction with background showreel video.
- [About](#about): What Gabriele does and how he can help.
- [Work — Documentary](#documentary): Authentic, character-driven documentary films.
- [Work — Commercial](#commercial): Corporate and brand films.
- [Work — Music](#music): Music videos and visual pieces.
- [Trusted by](#trusted-by): Brands and organisations Gabriele has worked with.
- [Contact](#contact): Get in touch via the contact form. Based in Amsterdam. KVK 94761639.

## Languages

- English (default)
- Dutch (Nederlands)

## Social

- Vimeo
- LinkedIn
- Instagram
